gp_payload:
rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb⟩
have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ (a - b)^2 := by nlinarith
calc
  (a + b) / 2 - Real.sqrt (a * b) = ((a - b)^2) / (2 * (a + b + 2 * Real.sqrt (a * b))) :=
    by
      field_simp
      ring
      nlinarith
  _ ≤ (a - b)^2 / (8 * b) :=
    by
      refine (div_le_div_right ?_).mpr ?_
      · positivity
      · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt (a * b) - Real.sqrt (b * b))]

intro h
norm_num at h
have h3 : 4 ≤ p ∧ p ≤ 18 := h₁; rcases h3 with ⟨hp4, hp18⟩; have hq : 4 ≤ q ∧ q ≤ 18 := h₂; rcases hq with ⟨hq4, hq18⟩
rcases h₀ with ⟨hp_prime, hq_prime⟩
have h_eq : p * q - (p + q) = 194 := h; have h_range : p * q - (p + q) ≤ 18*18 - (4+4) := by nlinarith; nlinarith
